message.content: Can I run ghostty inside a docker container?

content.text: Running ghostty inside docker is tricky because it needs GPU and display access. You can try: docker run --rm -e DISPLAY=$DISPLAY -v /tmp/.X11-unix:/tmp/.X11-unix ghostty-image. The docker approach works but requires X11 forwarding.

message.content: Got an error running docker: permission denied on /tmp/.X11-unix

content.text: The permission denied error on X11 socket is solved by running: xhost +local:docker before starting the container. This grants docker processes access to the X display. Issue fixed.
